data.current_description: Create a new webhook subscription for new_lead or new_message events
data.summary_suggestion: Create webhook subscription for lead or message events
data.description_suggestion: Create a new webhook subscription to receive notifications for new_lead or new_message events. Requires a valid webhook URL and event type selection. Returns the created webhook object with subscription ID and configuration details. The webhook will begin receiving event notifications immediately upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on required inputs (webhook URL, event type), what is returned (webhook object with ID), and side effects (immediate activation). message: Operation 'unsubscribeWebhook' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies the required input (webhook ID parameter), the immediate side effect (stops notifications), and the response type (success confirmation). This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and immediate impact of the operation.

data.current_description: Remove a webhook subscription by ID
data.description_suggestion: Remove a webhook subscription by its ID, immediately stopping all event notifications to that webhook. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Returns a success confirmation. The webhook will no longer receive any events after deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. data.current_description: Retrieve the last 10 leads. AI-enriched data for Answered Calls only appears when ready.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the most recent 10 leads (new or updated). Returns lead objects with core information. AI-enriched data for Answered Calls is included only when processing is complete; incomplete enrichment may result in partial data. Use the optional parameter to filter or paginate results as needed.

Enhanced version clarifies that enrichment is asynchronous and may be incomplete, explains the return value structure, and mentions parameter options for filtering/pagination.
